instruction: Open Notes and create a note whose first line is {TITLE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads the note body via AppleScript; the no-op leaves no such note so the substring check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to make new note with properties {body:"{TITLE}"}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Notes" to get body of notes as string
